products.name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Wireless Gaming Mouse
products.description: The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 is engineered for esports professionals who demand the absolute best in precision and responsiveness. Weighing just 60 grams, this ultralight wireless mouse eliminates drag and fatigue during extended gaming sessions. Powered by the HERO 2 sensor, it delivers up to 32,000 DPI with zero smoothing, filtering, or acceleration. The LIGHTSPEED wireless technology ensures a lag-free connection with up to 95 hours of battery life. A favourite among competitive players worldwide, this mouse redefines what wireless gaming peripherals can achieve.

products.name: Keychron Q3 Pro QMK/VIA Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: The Keychron Q3 Pro is a premium tenkeyless mechanical keyboard built with a full aluminium CNC body for a solid, premium typing feel. It supports both wired and wireless Bluetooth 5.1 connectivity, making it ideal for multi-device setups. Fully programmable via QMK and VIA firmware, every key and layer can be customised to your exact workflow. The gasket-mount design and sound-dampening foam layers deliver a satisfyingly thocky and refined typing experience. Whether for coding, writing, or gaming, the Q3 Pro is a long-term investment in comfort and performance.

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.description: The Sony WH-1000XM5 sets the gold standard in wireless noise cancellation with eight microphones and two processors working in harmony to silence the world around you. Featuring 30mm drivers and LDAC codec support, it delivers Hi-Res audio quality over Bluetooth with stunning clarity and depth. The redesigned lightweight frame and soft leatherette earcups provide hours of fatigue-free listening comfort. Multipoint connection allows seamless pairing with two devices simultaneously, perfect for switching between a laptop and smartphone. With up to 30 hours of battery life and quick-charge support, it keeps up with your entire day.

products.name: Samsung 990 Pro NVMe M.2 SSD
products.description: The Samsung 990 Pro delivers PCIe 4.0 sequential read speeds of up to 7,450 MB/s, making it one of the fastest consumer NVMe SSDs available today. Built with Samsung's V-NAND technology and a powerful in-house controller, it handles intensive workloads like 4K video editing, large game loads, and data-heavy applications with zero compromise. The thermal control algorithm and nickel-coated controller ensure consistent performance even under sustained load. Samsung Magician software provides real-time drive health monitoring and firmware updates. A perfect upgrade for creators, gamers, and professionals who refuse to wait.

products.name: ASUS ROG Swift PG279QM 27" IPS Gaming Monitor
products.description: The ASUS ROG Swift PG279QM is a 27-inch IPS gaming monitor delivering QHD resolution at a blazing 240Hz refresh rate, giving you both visual fidelity and competitive-grade smoothness. NVIDIA G-Sync Ultimate certification ensures zero screen tearing and minimal input lag across all frame rates. The Fast IPS panel achieves a 1ms GTG response time with wide colour coverage, producing vivid and accurate visuals whether you are gaming or colour-grading. The Aura Sync RGB lighting on the rear adds ambient illumination that can match your entire setup. An ergonomic stand with full height, tilt, swivel, and pivot adjustment completes this world-class display.

products.name: TP-Link Archer AX73 Wi-Fi 6 Router
products.description: The TP-Link Archer AX73 is a dual-band Wi-Fi 6 router delivering combined speeds of up to 5400 Mbps across a 2.4GHz and 5GHz band, built for modern homes filled with multiple connected devices. Six high-gain antennas with beamforming technology focus signals directly at your devices for stronger, more reliable connections throughout every room. OFDMA and MU-MIMO technologies allow simultaneous data transmission to multiple devices, dramatically reducing network congestion. WPA3 security provides the latest encryption standard to protect your network from intrusions. The intuitive Tether app makes setup, parental controls, and device management effortlessly simple.

products.name: Razer BlackShark V2 Pro Wireless Gaming Headset
products.description: The Razer BlackShark V2 Pro is Razer's flagship wireless gaming headset, trusted by esports professionals for its exceptional audio clarity and tournament-ready design. The 50mm TriForce Titanium drivers are tuned to produce precise soundstage imaging, giving competitive players a decisive edge in directional audio awareness. The detachable HyperClear Super Wideband Mic captures crystal-clear voice with background noise suppression certified by TeamSpeak. Wireless freedom via 2.4GHz USB dongle ensures zero latency, while the SmartSwitch button allows instant switching to Bluetooth. Up to 70 hours of battery life means this headset outlasts your longest sessions.

products.name: SteelSeries QcK Heavy XXL Desk Pad
products.description: The SteelSeries QcK Heavy XXL is one of the most popular gaming desk pads in the world, covering your entire desk surface with a premium micro-woven cloth optimised for both optical and laser mice. The extra-thick 6mm base provides a cushioned typing and mousing surface that reduces wrist fatigue during marathon sessions. A non-slip rubber base keeps the pad firmly in place even during intense gameplay. The stitched edges resist fraying and peeling, ensuring this desk pad remains pristine through years of daily use. At 900mm x 400mm, it comfortably accommodates a full-size keyboard, large mouse movements, and even a phone or notebook.

products.name: Seagate Portable 2TB External Hard Drive
products.description: The Seagate Portable Drive offers an affordable and reliable way to expand your storage and carry your important files wherever you go. Slim enough to slip into a shirt pocket, it connects via a single USB 3.0 cable with no external power required, making it effortlessly portable. Compatible with Windows and Mac out of the box, it requires no driver installation for immediate plug-and-play use. Seagate's time-tested hard drive reliability is backed by a 3-year limited warranty and access to 4 months of Mylio Photos and 2 months of Adobe Creative Cloud Photography. Whether for backing up documents, photos, or video projects, this drive delivers trusted capacity at great value.

products.name: Corsair K70 RGB Pro Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: The Corsair K70 RGB Pro is a full-size gaming keyboard built on an aircraft-grade aluminium frame that provides rigidity and a premium look that stands up to years of intense use. Per-key RGB backlighting with 16.8 million colours is powered by CORSAIR iCUE software, enabling dynamic lighting effects, custom macros, and full integration with other iCUE-compatible peripherals. Dedicated multimedia controls and a USB pass-through port add everyday convenience to a competition-ready board. PBT double-shot keycaps resist shine and wear far longer than standard ABS caps. Six on-board profile storage slots let you carry your settings to any PC without software.

products.name: Anker 341 USB-C Hub 7-in-1
products.description: The Anker 341 USB-C Hub transforms a single USB-C port into a versatile 7-in-1 connectivity hub, perfect for ultrabooks and laptops with limited ports. It features a 4K HDMI output, USB-C Power Delivery pass-through up to 85W, three USB-A 3.0 ports, an SD card slot, and a microSD slot — all in one compact unit. The slim, foldable design and lightweight build mean it fits easily in any laptop bag without adding noticeable bulk. Anker's premium quality assurance and durable construction ensure consistent performance without overheating. Compatible with MacBook, iPad Pro, and any USB-C laptop, it is the one hub you will always want in your bag.

products.name: LG 27UK850-W 4K UHD IPS Monitor with USB-C
products.description: The LG 27UK850-W delivers stunning 4K UHD clarity on a 27-inch IPS panel with virtually borderless three-sided design, making it a refined choice for creative professionals and power users. USB-C connectivity with 60W power delivery means you can connect, charge, and display a MacBook or modern laptop with a single cable. 95% DCI-P3 colour coverage and factory HDR 400 certification ensure that images, videos, and designs are rendered with rich, accurate colour. AMD FreeSync support eliminates screen tearing for smoother desktop and gaming experiences. The ergonomic stand supports height, tilt, and pivot adjustments so you can find the perfect viewing angle for long workdays.

products.name: NETGEAR Nighthawk RAX50 AX5400 Wi-Fi 6 Router
products.description: The NETGEAR Nighthawk RAX50 is a high-performance Wi-Fi 6 router designed to handle the demands of busy households with dozens of connected devices. Delivering up to 5.4Gbps combined across dual bands, it provides uninterrupted 4K streaming, fast cloud gaming, and lag-free video calls for everyone at once. A 1.5GHz triple-core processor ensures the router handles heavy network traffic without breaking a sweat. NETGEAR Armor powered by Bitdefender provides enterprise-grade cybersecurity to protect every device on your network. The Nighthawk app offers effortless setup and advanced controls including smart parental controls and real-time traffic monitoring.

products.name: Audio-Technica ATH-M50x Professional Studio Headphones
products.description: The Audio-Technica ATH-M50x remains one of the most trusted studio headphones in the world, beloved by audio engineers, podcasters, and audiophiles for its exceptionally flat, accurate frequency response. The 45mm large-aperture drivers with rare earth magnets deliver an extended frequency range and a natural soundstage that makes mixing decisions reliable and translatable. Critically acclaimed for its powerful bass response and detailed mids and highs without artificial colouration. The earcups swivel 90 degrees for single-ear monitoring, and the detachable cable system accommodates three included cables for studio or on-the-go use. Constructed to withstand professional daily use with a robust yet foldable frame.

products.name: Elgato Stream Deck MK.2
products.description: The Elgato Stream Deck MK.2 is the ultimate control surface for streamers, content creators, and power users who want instant, tactile access to their most-used actions. Its 15 customisable LCD keys display live visuals and trigger any action — launching scenes in OBS, muting microphones, switching camera feeds, triggering sound effects, or opening applications — all with a single tap. The detachable faceplate lets you swap styles to match your setup aesthetics, and a new, improved stand with adjustable angle ensures ergonomic desktop placement. Deep integration with Stream Deck software allows multi-action buttons, profile switching, and integration with over 300 apps including Spotify, Adobe, Zoom, and Twitter. A game-changer for anyone who values workflow efficiency.

products.name: WD Blue SN580 NVMe SSD
products.description: The WD Blue SN580 delivers PCIe Gen 4 NVMe performance at an accessible price, making it an excellent upgrade for everyday laptops and desktops. Sequential read speeds of up to 4,150 MB/s significantly outpace traditional SATA SSDs, resulting in noticeably faster boot times, application launches, and file transfers. The single-sided form factor makes it compatible with slim ultrabooks and compact builds where space is at a premium. WD's nCache 4.0 technology intelligently manages writes to balance sustained performance and longevity. The included WD Discovery software provides drive health monitoring, automatic backups, and firmware update management.

products.name: Logitech MX Keys S Advanced Wireless Keyboard
products.description: The Logitech MX Keys S is crafted for serious typists and productivity professionals who spend long hours at the keyboard and demand comfort, precision, and intelligent features. The spherically dished key design cradles each fingertip to reduce missed keystrokes and typing fatigue, while the backlit keys automatically adjust brightness based on ambient lighting. Bluetooth and USB Logi Bolt receiver support allow wireless connection to up to three devices, with Easy-Switch keys letting you jump between them instantly. Smart Actions feature in Logi Options+ software enables custom automation and app-specific shortcuts to accelerate your workflows. A built-in battery charges over USB-C and lasts up to 10 days on a single charge.

products.name: Blue Yeti USB Condenser Microphone
products.description: The Blue Yeti is the world's most popular USB microphone for podcasters, streamers, YouTubers, and remote workers who need studio-quality audio without a complex recording chain. Three condenser capsules in an array allow you to switch between four pickup patterns — cardioid, bidirectional, omnidirectional, and stereo — making it one of the most versatile broadcast microphones available. Onboard gain control, mute button, and headphone output for zero-latency monitoring are all built directly into the mic's body. The internal shock mount minimises vibration noise from your desk, while the solid metal construction and removable adjustable stand make it a handsome addition to any workspace. Plug-and-play USB connectivity means no drivers or audio interfaces are needed.

products.name: BenQ PD3220U 32" 4K Designer Monitor
products.description: The BenQ PD3220U is purpose-built for graphic designers, video editors, and 3D artists who require colour precision, large canvas space, and professional-grade connectivity. The 32-inch 4K IPS panel covers 95% of the P3 colour space with factory calibration ensuring Delta E < 3 out of the box, meeting the demands of colour-critical workflows. Thunderbolt 3 support with 60W power delivery and dual USB-C downstream ports create a clean, single-cable desk setup for modern workstations. The exclusive Display Pilot software and hotkey puck allow instant workspace switching between preset modes tailored for CAD, animation, sRGB, and more. An eye-care certified flicker-free panel with low blue light mode keeps your vision protected through long creative sessions.

products.name: Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro Wireless Gaming Mouse
products.description: The Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro continues the legacy of one of the best-selling gaming mice in history with a completely redesigned ultra-lightweight shell weighing only 63 grams. The ergonomic right-handed shape has been refined through thousands of hours of grip data analysis to provide natural, fatigue-free support for palm and claw grippers. Razer's HyperSpeed Wireless technology delivers sub-1ms connection speed while Focus Pro 30K optical sensor tracks on virtually any surface including glass. Optical mouse switches rated for 90 million clicks provide instant, debounce-free actuation without the wear of mechanical mechanisms. Up to 90 hours of battery life ensures you never have to interrupt your game for a charge.

products.name: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5 RGB RAM
products.description: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5 is a high-performance memory kit designed for Intel and AMD DDR5 platforms, delivering a significant boost in bandwidth and responsiveness over DDR4. Intel XMP 3.0 and AMD EXPO profiles allow one-click overclocking directly from the BIOS without manual configuration. The aggressive heat spreader design keeps temperatures in check during sustained workloads, ensuring stability even when overclocked beyond stock speeds. Per-stick RGB lighting with sync support across major motherboard software including ASUS Aura, MSI Mystic Light, and Gigabyte RGB Fusion adds a vibrant visual flair to any windowed build. Available in kits from 16GB to 96GB to match any use case from everyday computing to extreme content creation.

products.name: TP-Link TL-SG108 8-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Switch
products.description: The TP-Link TL-SG108 is a reliable 8-port Gigabit Ethernet unmanaged switch that instantly upgrades your wired home or office network to full 1000Mbps speeds on all ports. Its plug-and-play design requires no software, configuration, or management — simply connect it and all eight ports are fully operational within seconds. The metal housing dissipates heat passively without any fan, resulting in completely silent operation ideal for living rooms, home offices, and server closets. Energy-efficient IEEE 802.3az technology automatically reduces power consumption on idle or low-activity ports, saving electricity without any configuration. A sturdy metal chassis supports both desktop and wall-mount installation options.

products.name: Elgato Key Light Air Professional Streaming Light
products.description: The Elgato Key Light Air is a studio-quality LED panel designed to give streamers, video callers, and content creators professional, flattering illumination without a complicated lighting setup. Producing 1400 lumens from a panel of 80 OSRAM LEDs, it delivers bright, even light free from the harsh hotspots or shadows of typical desk lamps. Colour temperature is adjustable from 2900K warm white to 7000K daylight to match any environment, and brightness can be fine-tuned to any level via the Control Center app or directly from a Stream Deck. Wi-Fi connectivity means no drivers are required and setup takes under a minute from the app on any device. The lightweight clamp mount attaches to virtually any desk edge without tools.

products.name: Samsung T7 Shield Portable SSD
products.description: The Samsung T7 Shield is a rugged portable SSD built for adventurers, field workers, and on-the-go creators who need their data safe in demanding environments. An IP65 rating protects against dust and water jets, while the textured rubberised exterior absorbs drops from up to three metres without data loss. USB 3.2 Gen 2 interface delivers read speeds of up to 1,050 MB/s — more than enough for smooth 4K video playback and rapid file transfers directly from camera to drive. Samsung's AES 256-bit hardware encryption keeps your data private on the go. At just 98 grams and fitting easily in a palm, this is the ideal companion for any fieldwork or travel workflow.

products.name: ASUS ROG Chakram X Origin Wireless Gaming Mouse
products.description: The ASUS ROG Chakram X Origin is a flagship multi-mode wireless gaming mouse that supports tri-mode connectivity — 2.4GHz RF, Bluetooth, and wired USB — giving you seamless transitions across all your devices. A push-fit hot-swappable switch socket lets you replace the main switches in seconds with any 3-pin Omron-compatible switch, giving you full control over tactile feel and actuation force. The 36,000 DPI ROG AimPoint Pro optical sensor with up to 750 IPS tracking speed and 50G acceleration ensures pixel-perfect cursor control. The signature removable analogue joystick on the thumb rest adds remappable functionality unavailable in any other gaming mouse. ROG Armory Crate software handles full macro programming, RGB personalisation, and firmware updates.

products.name: Jabra Evolve2 75 Wireless Business Headset
products.description: The Jabra Evolve2 75 is an enterprise-grade wireless headset engineered to maximise focus and communication quality in open-plan offices and remote work environments. Eight microphones across the boom arm and earcups work together for industry-leading call clarity and active noise cancellation that filters out busy background environments. Leatherette-padded memory foam ear cushions create a comfortable passive seal that blocks ambient noise even with ANC turned off. Microsoft Teams and UC-certified, it integrates seamlessly with all major video conferencing platforms including Zoom, Google Meet, and Cisco Webex with dedicated hardware buttons. Up to 36 hours of battery life and the included charging stand mean it is always ready when you need it.

products.name: Twelve South HiRise Pro Monitor Stand
products.description: The Twelve South HiRise Pro is a premium adjustable desk stand designed to elevate your monitor or laptop to a healthier and more productive viewing angle, reducing neck and back strain during long work sessions. Crafted from sturdy aluminium with a premium leather wrap, it brings a refined, minimal aesthetic to any professional workspace. The height adjusts in precise increments from 6.5 to 17.5 centimetres to dial in the perfect eye-level position for your screen size. A wide platform accommodates monitors up to 30 inches or virtually any laptop, and the open design provides ventilation underneath to prevent heat build-up. Cable management guides beneath the stand keep your desk free from unsightly wire clutter.

products.name: Ubiquiti UniFi 6 Lite Wi-Fi 6 Access Point
products.description: The Ubiquiti UniFi 6 Lite is a professional-grade Wi-Fi 6 access point that brings enterprise-level wireless networking performance to homes, small offices, and growing businesses. Supporting up to 300 concurrent clients with OFDMA and MU-MIMO technology, it eliminates congestion even in dense device environments. Dual-band design provides 2.4GHz coverage for legacy devices and 5GHz AX speeds for modern laptops, phones, and streaming devices. PoE-powered via a single Ethernet cable for clean, wire-free ceiling or wall installation with no power adapter required. Managed through the intuitive UniFi Network application, it can be deployed alongside other UniFi switches, routers, and cameras in a unified network ecosystem.

products.name: Corsair HS80 RGB Wireless Gaming Headset
products.description: The Corsair HS80 RGB Wireless is a premium gaming headset that combines Dolby Atmos spatial audio support with a broadcast-grade microphone for a well-rounded gaming and communication experience. The 50mm high-density neodymium audio drivers produce rich, detailed soundscapes that immerse you in every environment, from subtle footsteps to cinematic explosions. A low-latency 2.4GHz wireless connection delivers up to 20 metres of range and up to 20 hours of battery life per charge. The lightweight aluminium headband and plush memory foam earcups are built for comfort during extended sessions. Full iCUE software integration allows custom EQ tuning, microphone monitoring, and per-zone RGB lighting to match your setup theme.

products.name: Ugreen 100W 4-Port GaN Desktop Charger
products.description: The Ugreen 100W 4-Port GaN Charger harnesses the latest gallium nitride semiconductor technology to deliver up to 100W of total charging power from a charger body roughly the size of a standard laptop adapter. Two USB-C ports with Power Delivery and two USB-A ports with Quick Charge 3.0 allow you to simultaneously charge a laptop, tablet, and two smartphones from a single wall socket. Intelligent power distribution automatically adjusts wattage to each connected device based on its charging requirements, ensuring nothing receives more power than it can handle. Multi-layer protection including over-temperature, over-voltage, and over-current safeguards every device connected to it. A universal input voltage of 100-240V makes it travel-ready for international trips.
